A 91

CHICK-FIL-A AT INTERNATIONAL SPEEDWAY FSR

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: April 9, 2026

Solid and unflashy: CHICK-FIL-A AT INTERNATIONAL SPEEDWAY FSR holds an A health grade, 91/100, out of its most recent Volusia County inspection on April 9, 2026.

On health score it's safer than 55% of Volusia County restaurants we grade. Diners rate it 4.5 from 4,769 reviews. Menus here flag options for healthy diners.

Get directions Call (386) 252-8232

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. April 9, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    1 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 1 basic

    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating)
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained

  2. September 5, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 1 intermediate · 2 basic

    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided
